---
title: "Talks"
description: "// invited talks, workshops, and conference presentations"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: default
listing:
  contents: ["*/index.qmd", "*.qmd"]
  exclude:
    filename: index.qmd
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
toc: false
---

::: {.empty-note}
No talks listed yet — check back soon.
:::
